rootCause: Several quests with build/install narratives (including energy/biogas-digester and multiple robotics/aquaria build quests) advanced via plain goto steps without requiring any process execution, so players were not immersed in actually constructing the described machine/structure.
resolution: Added explicit build/install process steps and corresponding process definitions with realistic durations (including a 21-day fermentation cycle for the biogas digester), updated coupled Skills docs, and added regression tests that enforce high process coverage plus mandatory process options for build/structure quest narratives.
